# Credits {.unnumbered}

The chapter list was constructed by surveying
publicly-available syllabi from major technical
blockchain courses, including Princeton's *Bitcoin and
Cryptocurrency Technologies*, Stanford's CS251
*Blockchain Technologies*, and MIT's 15.S12 *Blockchain
and Money*, and adopting a topic sequence suited to a
quantitative, statistics-flavored graduate audience.

The tested R code in several chapters is drawn from the
runnable companion in the `source-rmd/` directory, itself
developed and verified for this project.

Cover artwork palette anchored on a scholarly indigo
`#33356b`. Typography follows the sequence house style:
body text in a serif face, code in a monospace face.
